target_repository.name: sample_subject
target_repository.why: Bundled clean Python dependencies for 100/100 pip-audit certification

trigger_sequence.command: python scripts/collect_artifacts.py --python sample_subject/.venv/Scripts/python.exe --requirements sample_subject/requirements.txt --output-dir artifacts/training --baseline-audit config/golden_baseline_pip_audit.json
trigger_sequence.purpose: Collect all 5 raw artifacts for 8-metric coverage (audit, tree, outdated, licenses, baseline)
Primary tool output — vulnerability scan (also collected by step 2)
Transitive dependency tree for Hidden Relationship Mapping

trigger_sequence.command: python pip_audit_metrics.py --audit-json artifacts/training/pip_audit_report.json --tree-json artifacts/training/dependency_tree.json --outdated-json artifacts/training/outdated.json --licenses-json artifacts/training/licenses.json --baseline-audit-json artifacts/training/baseline_pip_audit.json --output-json artifacts/training/metrics.json --dashboard-json artifacts/training/dashboard.json
trigger_sequence.purpose: Derive all 8 SCA dashboard metrics (0-100 scale)
Verify all 8 metrics have raw parameters, artifacts, and 100/100 scores
